notes: Argentina report no injuries or suspensions and are expected to revert to their strongest XI after rotation in the group stage; Cape Verde are without midfielder Telmo Arcanjo (hamstring), though Sidny Lopes Cabral returns from suspension and Steven Moreira and Jovane Cabral are also expected back.
home_scorers: Lionel Messi (tournament's top scorer with 6 goals, on penalties, supreme form)
Lautaro Martinez (leading striker, relentless presser, clinical finisher)
Julian Alvarez (dynamic forward, pressing threat, rotation option off bench)
away_scorers: Dailon Livramento (main attacking threat, Cape Verde's key striker)
Ryan Mendes (98-cap veteran, experienced forward, set-piece presence)
Jovane Cabral (returning from suspension, wide attacking threat)
